title: Pod Priority and Preemption — How to use priority and preemption
text:
To use priority and preemption:
Add one or more
PriorityClasses
.
Create Pods with
priorityClassName
set to one of the added
PriorityClasses. Of course you do not need to create the Pods directly;
normally you would add
priorityClassName
to the Pod template of a
collection object like a Deployment.
Add one or more
PriorityClasses
.
Create Pods with
priorityClassName
set to one of the added
PriorityClasses. Of course you do not need to create the Pods directly;
normally you would add
priorityClassName
to the Pod template of a
collection object like a Deployment.
Keep reading for more information about these steps.
